name: Chicken Momo
description: Steamed dumplings filled with minced chicken, onions, and Himalayan spices, served with tomato achar.
ingredients: Chicken, Onion, Garlic, Ginger, Coriander, Flour, Tomato Achar

name: Veg Momo
description: Steamed dumplings stuffed with finely chopped cabbage, carrot, and paneer, served with spicy tomato achar.
ingredients: Cabbage, Carrot, Paneer, Onion, Garlic, Flour, Tomato Achar

name: Jhol Momo
description: Steamed momos served swimming in a tangy, spicy sesame-tomato broth — a Kathmandu street food favorite.
ingredients: Chicken, Sesame Seeds, Tomato, Timur, Garlic, Flour

name: Margherita Pizza
description: Classic wood-fired pizza topped with fresh mozzarella, tomato sauce, and basil.
ingredients: Pizza Dough, Mozzarella, Tomato Sauce, Fresh Basil, Olive Oil

name: Chicken Sekuwa Pizza
description: A local twist on pizza, topped with smoky chicken sekuwa, onions, and spicy mayo drizzle.
ingredients: Pizza Dough, Chicken Sekuwa, Mozzarella, Onion, Capsicum, Spicy Mayo

name: Chicken Spaghetti
description: Spaghetti tossed in a rich tomato-basil sauce with grilled chicken strips.
ingredients: Spaghetti, Chicken Breast, Tomato, Garlic, Basil, Parmesan

name: Veg Alfredo Pasta
description: Penne pasta in a creamy white sauce with sautéed seasonal vegetables.
ingredients: Penne, Cream, Butter, Broccoli, Carrot, Bell Pepper, Parmesan

name: Chicken Sekuwa
description: Skewered chicken marinated in traditional Nepali spices, grilled over open fire, served with chiura and chutney.
ingredients: Chicken, Timur, Garlic, Ginger, Mustard Oil, Chiura, Chutney

name: Butter Naan
description: Soft and fluffy leavened flatbread baked until golden and brushed with butter.
ingredients: Flour, Yogurt, Yeast, Butter, Milk, Salt

name: Chicken Thukpa
description: Hearty Himalayan noodle soup with tender chicken pieces and seasonal vegetables in a warm broth.
ingredients: Noodles, Chicken, Cabbage, Carrot, Garlic, Spring Onion

name: Chocolate Lava Cake
description: Warm chocolate cake with a molten center, served with vanilla ice cream.
ingredients: Dark Chocolate, Butter, Eggs, Flour, Vanilla Ice Cream

name: Masala Tea
description: Hot spiced milk tea brewed with cardamom, ginger, and cinnamon — the everyday Nepali classic.
ingredients: Milk, Black Tea, Cardamom, Ginger, Cinnamon, Sugar
